facebook-scrape.summary: Scraped Facebook (3:10 AM ET Apr 1). No new activity since prior run (06:08 UTC). Notifications: only new unread is 'Window Cleaning Business Owners has a new post' (3h, someone else's post) and group description change for 'Homeowners looking for Contractors and Remodelers' — zero comment notifications on Vito's Novaro AI posts. All other unreads (admin welcome tags, Cheryl likes photo, Ann/Cheryl friend confirmations, Sean Baker acceptance) predate last run. Messenger: Ann Giroux is sole unread thread — same DM already counted. Activity log: most recent Vito action is Mar 31 at 6:17 PM (admin welcome mention), nothing on Apr 1. Cumulative totals unchanged: 18 groups, 18 posts live, 116 comments, 39 positive, 4 DMs, 13 interest signals. Daily Apr 1 entry unchanged: {groups:18, posts:0, comments:3, positive:1, dms:1, interest:1}.

linkedin-scrape.summary: Scraped LinkedIn (3:37 AM ET Apr 1): No changes since last run (06:38 UTC). 1,040 connections, 181 pending sent requests — most recent batch sent ~19 hours ago (Jim Black, David Sconza, Justin Walsh, Patrick Winterstein, Aidan Westphalen, Gavin Bilby, Karter Howard, Eli Nash, Jackson Manning, Rex Owen). Cumulative requestsAccepted still 3 (no new acceptances). Messaging inbox now shows 10 unread (up from 9) — new thread is Stefano Cardillo (outbound message sent Mar 31, no reply yet). No new inbound prospect replies. Active outbound threads with no responses: Colin Crump, Tyler Grodsky, David Kozak, Jason Stahlberg, William DeMichele, Michael Rose, Rich Iandoli. Only inbound: Vincent Handugan VA counter-pitch (Mar 20, not a buying signal). No new interest signals.
